MEGABONK

Fight for survival against endless waves of enemies in this roguelike arena shooter! Defeat enemies to collect XP gems and level up, choosing powerful upgrades each time. Survive as long as you can while growing stronger with each wave. The enemies get tougher, but so do you!

Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions | Space: Fire your weapon in the direction you're facing | Shift: Dash to quickly evade enemies (cooldown applies) | Z: Use special ability when charged

MEGABONK

Fight for survival against endless waves of enemies in this roguelike arena shooter! Defeat enemies to collect XP gems and level up, choosing powerful upgrades each time. Survive as long as you can while growing stronger with each wave. The enemies get tougher, but so do you!

Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions | Space: Fire your weapon in the direction you're facing | Shift: Dash to quickly evade enemies (cooldown applies) | Z: Use special ability when charged
